zh.Ijsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands: 荷蘭武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jan II Lord of Egmond於1385年出生在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆-賓時，他的父親Arnoud I van Egmond39歲，母親Jolenta von Leiningen35歲。他於1409年6月23日與Maria van Arkel結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1451年1月13日在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在荷蘭努-拉藍德艾姆-賓。

zh-hans.Ijsselstein, Utrecht, Netherlands: 荷兰武特雷特易瑟爾斯坦
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jan II Lord of Egmond于1385年出生在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆-賓时，他的父亲Arnoud I van Egmond39岁，母亲Jolenta von Leiningen35岁。他于1409年6月23日与Maria van Arkel结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1451年1月13日在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在荷兰努-拉藍德艾姆-賓。

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Jan II Lord of Egmond was born in 1385, in Egmond-Binnen, North Holland, Netherlands, his father, Arnoud I van Egmond, was 39 and his mother, Jolenta von Leiningen, was 35. He married Maria van Arkel on 23 June 1409. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 13 January 1451, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Egmond-Binnen, North Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jan II Lord of Egmond est né en 1385, à Egmond-Binnen, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Arnoud I van Egmond, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Jolenta von Leiningen, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Maria van Arkel le 23 juin 1409. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 13 janvier 1451, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Egmond-Binnen, Hollande-septentrionale, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jan II Lord of Egmond 1385 in Egmond-Binnen, Nord-Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnoud I van Egmond 39 und seine Mutter Jolenta von Leiningen 35. Er hat am 23. Juni 1409 Maria van Arkel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 13. Januar 1451 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Egmond-Binnen, Nord-Holland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jan II Lord of Egmond è nato il nel 1385 nel Egmond-Binnen, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Arnoud I van Egmond, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Jolenta von Leiningen, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Maria van Arkel il 23 giugno 1409. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 13 gennaio 1451, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Egmond-Binnen, Noord-Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.Egmond Abbey, Egmond-Binnen, North Holla: オランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンド-ビン
ja.lifeSummary: Jan II Lord of Egmondが1385年にオランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンド-ビンで生まれた時，父Arnoud I van Egmondは39歳，母Jolenta von Leiningenは35歳であった。1409年6月23日にMaria van Arkelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1451年1月13日に故郷で66歳で死去し，オランダノオルド-hオランドエグモンド-ビンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jan II Lord of Egmond(이)가 1385년 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽-빈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnoud I van Egmond(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Jolenta von Leiningen(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1409년 6월 23일 Maria van Arkel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1451년 1월 13일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 노르드-홀랜드 그몽-빈에 묻혔다.

pt.Egmond Abbey, Egmond-Binnen, North Holla: Egmond-Binnen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jan II Lord of Egmond nasceu em 1385, em Egmond-Binnen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Arnoud I van Egmond, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Jolenta von Leiningen, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria van Arkel em 23 de junho de 1409. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1451, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Egmond-Binnen, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jan II Lord of Egmond родился в 1385 г. в местности эгмонд-биннен, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Arnoud I van Egmond было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Jolenta von Leiningen, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria van Arkel 23 июня 1409 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 13 января 1451 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности эгмонд-биннен, нурд-холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jan II Lord of Egmond nació en 1385, en Egmond-Binnen, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Arnoud I van Egmond, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Jolenta von Leiningen, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Maria van Arkel el 23 de junio de 1409. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 13 de enero de 1451, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Egmond-Binnen, Noord-Holland, Países Bajos.
